title: Sweet & Crispy Malaysian Semolina Flour Crumble
description: A savory and comforting sweet dish featuring semolina flour, which is egg-free-friendly and perfect for hangovers or any time you need a quick breakfast.

ingredients.name: Optional: zest of half a lemon

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine semolina flour, brown sugar, and salt. Stir in the juice from one lemon.
Add glucose, vanilla extract, and optional lemon zest to the dry ingredients and mix well until there are no lumps.
Pour the crumble mixture into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until edges start to brown. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
For an extra crispy texture, you can chill the cooled crumble in the fridge for at least 30 minutes before serving.
